title: Tom's Oritech Storage
description: Tom's simple storage in Oritech style!
body:
This resource pack transforms Tom's Simple Storage into a sleek, tech-forward style inspired by the aesthetics of the Oritech mod. All storage blocks, interfaces, and textures are overhauled to match the clean, futuristic, and high-tech vibe of Oritech to ensure visual consistency for modern modded builds.

Original Oritech mod click [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/oritech)

Original Tom's simple storage mod click [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)
